name_en: Premium quality, BUR's best-selling birch brown check tote, featuring a signature check pattern, contrast stitching leather trim, and a leather-covered mirror charm. Material is eco-friendly waterproof and stain-resistant canvas. Lightweight, spacious, and versatile. A top pick for influencers, a must-have for this year 🌟
name_cn:
Premium quality, BUR's best-selling birch brown check tote, featuring a signature check pattern, contrast stitching leather trim, and a leather-covered mirror charm. Material is eco-friendly waterproof and stain-resistant canvas. Lightweight, spacious, and versatile. A top pick for influencers, a must-have for this year 🌟
Dimensions: 34 x 14 x 28cm🌟
